content.text: 将字符串截断到指定长度，如果截断则添加省略号。Truncates a string to a specified length and adds ellipsis if truncated
如果需要则带有省略号的截断字符串，或在限制内的原始字符串。Truncated string with ellipsis if needed, or original string if within limit

```ts
// Basic truncation
truncateString('hello world', 5); // -> 'he...' (slice(0, 5-3) + '...')
truncateString('hello world', 8); // -> 'hello...'

```

```ts
// Default length (10)
truncateString('hello world'); // -> 'hello w...'
truncateString('short'); // -> 'short' (no truncation needed)

```

```ts
// No truncation needed
truncateString('hello world', 11); // -> 'hello world'
truncateString('hello world', 20); // -> 'hello world'

```

```ts
// Very short limits (num <= 3: slice to num then append '...')
truncateString('hello', 3); // -> 'hel...'
truncateString('hello', 2); // -> 'he...'
truncateString('hello', 1); // -> 'h...'

```

summary.text: 要截断的字符串。String to truncate
截断后的总长度上限（含省略号，默认：10）。Total length cap including the ellipsis (default: 10)

text.comment: 截断后的总长度上限（含省略号，默认：10）。Total length cap including the ellipsis (default: 10)

Function:

truncateString

Description:

将字符串截断到指定长度，如果截断则添加省略号。Truncates a string to a specified length and adds ellipsis if truncated

Returns:

如果需要则带有省略号的截断字符串，或在限制内的原始字符串。Truncated string with ellipsis if needed, or original string if within limit

Example:
// Basic truncation
truncateString('hello world', 5); // -> 'he...' (slice(0, 5-3) + '...')
truncateString('hello world', 8); // -> 'hello...'
Example:
// Default length (10)
truncateString('hello world'); // -> 'hello w...'
truncateString('short'); // -> 'short' (no truncation needed)
Example:
// No truncation needed
truncateString('hello world', 11); // -> 'hello world'
truncateString('hello world', 20); // -> 'hello world'
Example:
// Very short limits (num <= 3: slice to num then append '...')
truncateString('hello', 3); // -> 'hel...'
truncateString('hello', 2); // -> 'he...'
truncateString('hello', 1); // -> 'h...'
Example:
// Edge cases
truncateString('', 5); // -> ''
